title: Pilosella trigenes
intro: Pilosella trigena, also known as Hieracium trigenum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Pilosella trigena include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pilosella trigena include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
